title: rosa coriifolia var. genuina
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. genuina, also known as Chinese rose or wild rose, is a type of flowering shrub native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Rosa coriifolia var. genuina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality.
